User is Paolo Mura, a networker and strategy enthusiast looking for new opportunities in an international and stimulating environment. He has worked on projects requiring community building and trend focus, toured with a successful Italian artist, developed his own music label, and is co-founder and creative director of Ecosistemi Festival since 2020, a post-internet oriented festival on Vesuvius Volcano in Naples. He grew up in Italy and has built relationships across Europe. He is applying for a Project Manager position at a festival named Polifonic.

attrs.value: networker, strategy enthusiast, co-founder and creative director of Ecosistemi Festival since 2020

label: Ecosistemi Festival aims to be the first Italian festival dedicated to post-internet subcultures, combining musical avant-garde, art, and natural ecosystems. Its objectives include: building an artistic and musical offering attentive to emerging subcultures and new generations in an inclusive, international, and digital-aware perspective; offering opportunities to new generation musical artists involving both established names and niches sharing an internet-based aesthetic; enhancing forms of aggregation and artistic expression to bring users to a conscious use of natural spaces; consolidating the initiative as a national reference point and strengthening the network on a European or international scale.

attrs.value: first Italian post-internet subculture festival combining music, art, and nature

label: first Italian festival dedicated to post-internet subcultures
